ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #1234567890 has been shipped
ham.body:
Hello,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon! Your order #1234567890 has been shipped and is on its way.

Product Details:
- 1x Wireless Mouse
- 2x USB-C Cable
- 1x Charging Pad

Expected Delivery: 3-5 business days

Track your shipment here: <URL>

If you have any questions, feel free to contact our support at <URL>.

Shukriya for choosing Amazon!

Best regards,
Amazon Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required for Your Meeting Invite
spam.body:
Dear User,

You have been invited to an important meeting scheduled for 15th May 2026 at 10:00 AM IST.

Meeting ID: 123-456-7890
Password: 123456

Please confirm your attendance by clicking the link below:

Join Zoom Meeting: <URL>

If you do not respond within 24 hours, your account may be suspended for security reasons.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Regards,
Zoom Support Team
